final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic editorial photo, wide landscape
Primary request: astronaut floating in Earth orbit, surrounded by the Milky Way and nebulae, with partial space station structure at the frame edge
Scene/backdrop: low Earth orbit, vast deep space background filled with the Milky Way galaxy and colorful nebulae clouds, curvature of Earth visible below
Subject: astronaut in a detailed spacesuit with clearly visible helmet visor, gloves, suit seams, and mission patches, body gently floating in zero gravity
Style/medium: photorealistic space photography, NASA-style editorial
Composition/framing: wide-angle shot, slight low-angle perspective, astronaut centered with Earth's curvature at bottom and star field filling the background, partial space station truss structure at frame edge
Lighting/mood: primary light source is soft reflected light from Earth (warm blue-white earthshine), subtle rim lighting on spacesuit, awe-inspiring and grand atmosphere
Color palette: deep black void + luminous blue-white Earth glow + warm gold/orange nebula hues + cold white starlight
Materials/textures: realistic spacesuit fabric with layered insulation texture, reflective helmet visor showing Earth reflection, metallic space station structure
Constraints: astronaut must be the focal subject; space station appears only partially at frame edge; Earth's curvature visible but not dominant
Avoid: cartoon style, flat illustration, over-saturated unrealistic colors, deformed spacesuit proportions
